content_assignment_single_target.name: content_assignment_single_target
content_assignment_single_target.value: (CASE WHEN "content_assignment"."classroom_id" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END + CASE WHEN "content_assignment"."group_id" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END + CASE WHEN "content_assignment"."learner_id" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) = 1

content_version_published_reviewed.name: content_version_published_reviewed
content_version_published_reviewed.value: "content_version"."status" <> 'published' OR ("content_version"."reviewed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "content_version"."reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "content_version"."published_at" IS NOT NULL)
